seagate.mount_observation: /dev/disk8s2 on /Volumes/Seagate Portable Drive (ntfs, local, nodev, nosuid, read-only, noowners, noatime, fskit)

write_probe_error: mkdir: /Volumes/Seagate Portable Drive/.bloombee-write-test: Read-only file system
reason_download_not_started: Task required large HF downloads to use the external Seagate volume, but the volume is NTFS-mounted read-only on macOS; starting on internal disk would violate the storage constraint.
required_next_step: Provide a writable Seagate/external volume, preferably APFS or exFAT, remount with a working NTFS write driver, or explicitly approve another writable large-volume cache before rerunning the Instruct-2507 download/proof runner.
rerun_requirements: Use writable external cache, export HF_TOKEN without printing it, set HF_HUB_DISABLE_XET=1, set HF_HOME/HF_HUB_CACHE/HF_XET_CACHE on the writable volume, and retain logs/progress evidence.
